description: White House graphic. The background is a darkened photograph of an airport terminal showing TSA security checkpoint stanchions, signage, and travelers, with a 'STEP' and 'Slip-ins' advertisement across the top. Near the top is a small white line-art White House emblem above the serif label 'The WHITE HOUSE,' followed by a large white serif all-caps headline 'THANK YOU, POTUS.' Below are four white torn-paper banner strips, each with a news outlet logo and a headline: CNN US ('Airport wait times plummet from hours to minutes as TSA workers start getting back pay'); The Times-Picayune / nola.com ('Shorter wait times reported at New Orleans airport six weeks into government shutdown'); AP ('Airport bottlenecks ease as TSA workers get paid, but shutdown continues'); and CBS NEWS ('TSA wait times at BWI improve Monday after chaotic weekend'). The tweet text refers to 'the Democrat DHS Shutdown'.
notable_text: THANK YOU, POTUS | Airport wait times plummet from hours to minutes as TSA workers start getting back pay | Shorter wait times reported at New Orleans airport six weeks into government shutdown | Airport bottlenecks ease as TSA workers get paid, but shutdown continues | TSA wait times at BWI improve Monday after chaotic weekend
